shortDescription:
A soon-to-be-operational planetary sensor array and a missile defense battery will form the backbone of {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Demonym} regional defense operations.  The two facilities are linked through a common targeting network, and the destruction of either asset will compromise the effectiveness of the entire system, once operational.

{TEAM_TAR.FactionDef.ShortName} units are expected to probe defenses before committing heavier assault forces against whichever site appears weakest.  The governor's office has declared both installations mission-critical.
longDescription: Failure to preserve both facilities will be recorded as a failed contract regardless of enemy losses.

contractObjectiveList.title: Defend Sensor Array and Missile Defense Battery

dialogueContent.words:
<color=#99ebff>{TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Government} Regional Defense Liason:</color> {COMPANY.CompanyName}, this is Firebreak Control.  Although still no operational, the sensor array and the missile defense battery are linked to the regional defense grid...if either facility is destroyed, the entire network becomes ineffective.

Both sites must survive.
Copy, Firebreak Control.  We'll keep the sensor array online.
Standing by, securing the missile battery perimeter.

<color=#99ebff>{TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Government} Regional Defense Liason:</color> Expect probing attacks followed by reinforcement waves.  {TEAM_TAR.FactionDef.Demonym} commanders will likely strike whichever position appears weakest.

Hold both facilities until the proper {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.ShortName} reinforcements relieves you of the defensive task.
Contact!  Multiple hostile signatures approaching the sensor array.  First enemy lance confirmed.

{MC.If.Encounter.HasNoTag.KilledAllOpfor}<color=#99ebff>{TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Government} Regional Defense Liason:</color> Relieving forces have arrived.  Both facilities are online and still linked to the regional defense grid.

{MC.If.Encounter.HasNoTag.KilledAllOpfor}<color=#99ebff>{TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Government} Regional Defense Liason:</color> Enemy units remain active, disengage at your discretion, {COMPANY.CompanyName}.  Let the relieving forces have some fun.
<color=#99ebff>{TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Government} Regional Defense Liason:</color> All units, stand down.  One of the mission-critical facilities has been destroyed
<color=#99ebff>{TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Government} Regional Defense Liason:</color> Enemy losses are irrelevant.  The regional defense network cannot be activated.  Contract failed.
<color=#99ebff>{TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Government} Regional Defense Liason:</color> Second enemy lance entering engagement range.  They're coming straight for the missile battery.
Additional hostiles detected near the array.  This isn't a probe anymore.

<color=#99ebff>{TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Government} Regional Defense Liason:</color> New contacts near missile battery.

They're coordinating attacks between both facilities.
They're stacking pressure on both sites.
Warning, sensor array defenders; more enemy bogies moving to reinforce the assault.

<color=#99ebff>{TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Government} Regional Defense Liason:</color> Firebreak Control to all units: additional hostiles en route to battery site. The {TEAM_TAR.FactionDef.Demonym} commitment level is escalating.
<color=#99ebff>{TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Government} Regional Defense Liason:</color> Alert!  sensor arrays' defensive turrets have been knocked out and is now exposed.

<color=#99ebff>{TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Government} Regional Defense Liason:</color> Missile batteries' defense are offline.  {TEAM_TAR.FactionDef.ShortName} forces now have an open a path to the missile defense complex.
First enemy lance eliminated.
<color=#99ebff>{TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Government} Regional Defense Liason:</color> Second enemy lance has been neutralized.
Another set of bogies destroyed.
<color=#99ebff>{TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Government} Regional Defense Liason:</color> Hostile blips no longer combat effective.  Bravo Base remains operational.
Opfors elimated near the array.  Perimeter is holding.
<color=#99ebff>{TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Government} Regional Defense Liason:</color> Outstanding shooting.
{MC.Modification.AddTo.EncounterTags.KilledAllOpfor}<color=#99ebff>{TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Government} Regional Defense Liason:</color> Firebreak Control to all units --- no hostile contacts detected.
Looks like we cleaned the whole battlefield.

<color=#99ebff>{TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Government} Regional Defense Liason:</color> The governor's office will be pleased.  That's not just a successful defense...that's a textbook Firebreak Protocol execution.
